tasks.description: Tasks tab UI on step detail panel — checkbox list, inline-editable titles, drag-to-reorder, add task input, completed strikethrough
acceptance_criteria: TaskPanel component renders as collapsible panel below AnnotationPanel/CommentPanel in right sidebar when a step is selected
Fetches tasks for selected step via fetchTasks(workspaceId, stepId)
Checkbox list: each task has a checkbox that toggles is_completed via updateTask
Inline-editable titles: click title to edit, blur/enter saves via updateTask
Add Task input at bottom: type title + enter to create via createTask
Drag-to-reorder updates position field via updateTask for affected tasks
Delete task button (X icon) calls deleteTask
Loading state while fetching, empty state when no tasks

patterns_to_follow: CommentPanel pattern: standalone panel component with own data fetching, placed in canvas-view sidebar below entity panels
fetchTasks(workspaceId, stepId) returns Task[], createTask({workspace_id, step_id, title}), updateTask(id, partial), deleteTask(id)
Task interface: id, workspace_id, step_id, title, is_completed, position, assigned_to, created_by, created_at, updated_at
useWorkspace() for workspace context, toastError() for error handling
Dark theme: var(--text-primary), var(--text-tertiary), var(--border-subtle), var(--bg-surface-hover)
learnings_relevant: React state immutability: use [...arr].sort() not arr.sort()
React 19 useRef requires initial value: useRef(null)

tasks.special_instructions: Drag-to-reorder: Use native HTML drag and drop (onDragStart, onDragOver, onDrop) — do NOT install a new dependency. Keep it simple: swap positions on drop, batch-update the reordered tasks. Follow CommentPanel's pattern for data fetching lifecycle (useEffect with cancelled flag). TaskPanel is step-only (not section/touchpoint/stage) since tasks table has step_id FK.

tasks.description: Add semantic ARIA attributes to annotation indicator dots on canvas nodes
acceptance_criteria: Annotation indicator dots on step-node, section-node, touchpoint-node, stage-node have role='img' and aria-label describing the annotation
Screen readers announce annotation presence meaningfully

patterns_to_follow: Existing indicator dots have title attribute — add role='img' and aria-label alongside
Lucide-react icons: use aria-label not title prop (TS2322 — see LEARNINGS.md)
learnings_relevant: Lucide-react no title prop — use aria-label

tasks.special_instructions: Small change: add role='img' and aria-label='Annotated by perspective' to the annotation indicator div elements. Keep title attribute for mouse-hover tooltip.

shared_files.note: Task types and client wrappers already built in iter 76. Both slots read-only.

testing_plan.regression_reason: Risk score 7 from iter 76 (data model + shared files + >5 files) would trigger regression, but iter 75 ran full regression (32/32 PASS) just 2 iterations ago and iter 76 changes were purely additive (new table, new routes, no modifications to existing code). Deferring regression to iter 80 (next 8-iter cadence).
